title: Baked Crack Chicken (High-Protein Recipe) | Eati
introduction: Baked Crack Chicken is a comfort-style high-protein bake that is rich in flavor and easy to repeat. With chicken, spices, and creamy cheese notes, it helps you stay consistent while hitting your protein goal.

sections.heading: Ingredients
sections.content:
- Chicken
- Spices (garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, etc.)
- Cream cheese or similar
- Seasonings (salt and pepper)
- Optional: ranch-style flavors
- Salt and pepper

sections.heading: Instructions
sections.content:
1. Season chicken well and place in a baking dish.
2. Spread or dollop cream cheese over the chicken.
3. Add seasonings and optional ranch-style flavors.
4. Bake until chicken is cooked and the sauce is bubbly.
5. Serve and log your portion in Eati to keep macros accurate.

sections.heading: Calories, Fat, and Protein (Estimated)
sections.content:
Calories: 445 kcal per serving (estimated)
Fat: 25g
Protein: 48g

Tip: the cheese amount is a major driver of fat. Portion it.

conclusion: If you want a high-protein meal that feels indulgent, this bake fits the bill. Use Eati to track servings and stay on target.
metaDescription: Baked Crack Chicken recipe with estimated calories, fat, and protein. Includes ingredients, cooking steps, and Eati tracking tips.
